title: LOVEONE LAUNDRY EVENTS - 211info
text: BRAX LAUNDRY OREGON CITY LOVEONE LAUNDRY EVENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry services including detergent and softeners, if needed. Participants are limited to a maximum of 3 loads of laundry. A hotmeal and personal grooming supplies may be available, dependent upon available funding. All services available on a first-come, first-serve basis. 927 Molalla Avenue Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 2nd and 4th Wednesday 6pm-8pm Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Congregate Meals/Nutrition Sites Laundry Facilities Laundry Products Personal/Grooming Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - LOVEONE MOBILE SHOWERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
